aprayatna a. Not energetic or diligent, indifferent, apathetic, not zealously devoted to (with loc.); ˚tnaḥ sukhārtheṣu  Ms. 6. 26. 
— tnaḥ Absence of effort or exertion, indifference, apathy, laziness.
